title: News - QuantrolOx powers Quantum-Hub@MAHE | QuantrolOx
why:
- QuantrolOx and Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) have partnered to develop Quantum-Hub@MAHE, an open-architecture quantum ecosystem in India.
- The VIDYAQAR open-architecture platform will be used to build systems ranging from sub-50 qubit training devices to 1,000+ qubit industrial-grade quantum systems.
- Q-HUB@MAHE integrates quantum hardware experimentation, startup incubation, component innovation, workforce development, testing infrastructure, and translational research.
- The partnership supports hands-on education in quantum hardware for students and researchers, advancing India’s quantum engineering capabilities.
- The initiative involves collaborations with European partners (Bluefors, ConScience, Qblox) to strengthen both India and Europe’s position across the quantum value chain.
- The Quantum EDGE Academy will provide virtual lab experiences and professional training for future quantum engineers through interactive courses and simulated quantum hardware.
